sqlMap.select: SELECT TBL_CONTAINER.containerid, TBL_CONTAINER.containertypeid, TBL_CONTAINER.containerowndepid, TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypename, TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypename2 FROM TBL_CONTAINER JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTYPE ON TBL_CONTAINER.containertypeid = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypeid AND TBL_CONTAINER.tenant_id = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.tenant_id AND TBL_CONTAINER.companyid = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.companyid WHERE TBL_CONTAINER.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND TBL_CONTAINER.companyid = #companyID# AND containerowndepid = #v_DEPTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.containertypeid, TBL_CODELIST.code2 DocumentState, TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypename, TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypename2, TBL_CODELIST.name DOCUMENTSTATENAME, TBL_CODELIST.name2 DOCUMENTSTATENAME2, TBL_CODELIST.name3 DOCUMENTSTATENAME3, TBL_CODELIST.name4 DOCUMENTSTATENAME4 FROM TBL_CODELIST LEFT JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE ON TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.tenant_id = TBL_CODELIST.tenant_id AND TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.companyid = TBL_CODELIST.companyid AND TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.documentstate = TBL_CODELIST.code2 LEFT JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTYPE ON TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.tenant_id = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.tenant_id AND TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.companyid = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.companyid AND TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.containertypeid = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypeid WHERE TBL_CODELIST.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND TBL_CODELIST.companyid = #companyID# AND TBL_CODELIST.code1 = 'SA02' AND TBL_CODELIST.isuse = '1' ORDER BY TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.documentstate

SELECT TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.containertypeid, TBL_CODELIST.code2 DocumentState, TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypename, TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypename2, TBL_CODELIST.name DOCUMENTSTATENAME, TBL_CODELIST.name2 DOCUMENTSTATENAME2, TBL_CODELIST.name3 DOCUMENTSTATENAME3, TBL_CODELIST.name4 DOCUMENTSTATENAME4 FROM TBL_CODELIST LEFT JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE ON TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.tenant_id = TBL_CODELIST.tenant_id AND TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.companyid = TBL_CODELIST.companyid AND TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.documentstate = TBL_CODELIST.code2 LEFT JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTYPE ON TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.tenant_id = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.tenant_id AND TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.companyid = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.companyid AND TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.containertypeid = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypeid WHERE TBL_CODELIST.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND TBL_CODELIST.companyid = #companyID# AND TBL_CODELIST.code1 = 'A02' AND TBL_CODELIST.isuse = '1' ORDER BY TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.documentstate

sqlMap.select: SELECT containerid, usedepid as usedeptid, (SELECT displayname FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER T1 WHERE T1.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = A.usedepid) as containerTypeName, (SELECT displayname2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER T2 WHERE T2.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = A.usedepid) as containerTypeName2 FROM TBL_CONTAINERUSEDEP A WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND containerid = #v_CONTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT taskcode, keepingperiod, tempflag, displayrecflag, specialcatalogflag, sc1, sc2, sc3, keepingmethod, keepingplace, taskname, taskname2, subcategorycode, itemSecurity, isPublic FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND subcategorycode = #v_SUBCATECODE# AND delflag = '0' ORDER BY taskcode

SELECT taskcode, keepingperiod, tempflag, displayrecflag, specialcatalogflag, sc1, sc2, sc3, keepingmethod, keepingplace, taskname, taskname2, C.subcategorycode,
C.NAME2 AS name,
C.NAME AS name,
itemSecurity, isPublic, (SELECT CONCAT(CABINETCLASSNO, '001') FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.TASKCODE = B.TASKCODE ) CABINETID FROM TBL_TASKCODE B JOIN TBL_TASKSUBCATEGORY C ON B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND B.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID AND B.SUBCATEGORYCODE = C.SUBCATEGORYCODE WHERE B.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND B.companyid = #companyID# AND B.subcategorycode = #v_SUBCATECODE# AND delflag = '0' ORDER BY taskcode

sqlMap.select:
SELECT TBL_TASKCODE.taskcode, TBL_TASKCODE.taskname, NVL(TBL_TASKCODE.taskname2, TBL_TASKCODE.TASKNAME) AS TASKNAME2, TBL_TASKCODE.keepingperiod, TBL_TASKCODE.creationdate CREATEDATE, TBL_TASKCODE.kpreason, TBL_TASKCODE.keepingmethod, TBL_TASKCODE.keepingplace, TBL_TASKCODE.itemSecurity, TBL_TASKCODE.ispublic, TBL_TASKCODE.displayrecflag, TBL_TASKCODE.displayrectrastime, TBL_TASKCODE.exdisplayfrequency, TBL_TASKCODE.specialcatalogflag, TBL_TASKCODE.sc1, TBL_TASKCODE.sc2, TBL_TASKCODE.sc3, TBL_TASKCODE.displayusage, TBL_TASKCODE.description, TBL_TASKCODE.tempflag, TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO.processdate, TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO.applydate FROM TBL_TASKCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO ON TBL_TASKCODE.tenant_id = TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_TASKCODE.companyid = TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO.companyid AND TBL_TASKCODE.taskcode = TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO.taskcode WHERE TBL_TASKCODE.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND TBL_TASKCODE.companyid = #companyID# AND TBL_TASKCODE.taskcode = #v_TASKCODE#
AND (TRIM(TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO.processdeptcode) = #v_DEPTCODE# OR #v_TASKCODE# LIKE 'ZZ%' OR #v_TASKCODE# = '99999999')

SELECT taskcode, taskname, taskname2, keepingperiod, kpreason, keepingmethod, keepingplace, displayrecflag, displayrectrastime, exdisplayfrequency, specialcatalogflag, sc1, sc2, sc3, displayusage, description, subcategorycode FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #v_TASKCODE#
SELECT taskname, taskname2 FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #v_TASKCODE#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT processdeptcode, processdeptname, NVL(processdeptname2, PROCESSDEPTNAME) AS PROCESSDEPTNAME2, categorycode, cname, NVL(cname2,CNAME) AS CNAME2, mcategorycode, mcname, NVL(mcname2, MCNAME) AS MCNAME2, subcategorycode, scname, NVL(scname2, SCNAME) AS SCNAME2, taskcode, taskname, NVL(taskname2, TASKNAME) AS TASKNAME2, keepingperiod, keepingmethod, keepingplace, displayrecflag, displayrectrastime, specialcatalogflag, sc1, sc2, sc3, tempflag, rownum num FROM VTASKCLASS WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID#
AND (TRIM(processdeptcode) = #v_DEPTCODE# OR taskcode LIKE 'ZZ%' OR taskcode = '99999999')
AND UPPER(TASKNAME) LIKE UPPER(CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #title#), '%'))
AND UPPER(TASKCODE) LIKE UPPER(CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #code#), '%'))
ORDER BY taskcode ASC
ORDER BY PROCESSDEPTNAME TASKNAME TASKCODE TEMPFLAG CNAME MCNAME SCNAME KEEPINGPERIOD KEEPINGMETHOD KEEPINGPLACE DISPLAYRECFLAG SPECIALCATALOGFLAG DESC
) WHERE NUM BETWEEN #startRowForOracle# AND #endRowForOracle#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VTASKCLASS WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID#
AND (TRIM(processdeptcode) = #v_DEPTCODE# OR taskcode LIKE 'ZZ%' OR taskcode = '99999999')
AND TASKNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #title#), '%')
AND TASKCODE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #code#), '%')

SELECT processdeptcode, processdeptname, processdeptname2 FROM TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# AND delflag = '0' ORDER BY processdeptcode

isEqual.isEqual: SELECT sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, TO_CHAR(regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, TO_CHAR(deldate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DELDATE, reguserid, regusername FROM TBL_SEALINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# ORDER BY regdate DESC
isEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, TO_CHAR(regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, TO_CHAR(deldate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DELDATE, reguserid, regusername FROM TBL_SEALINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND deldate IS NULL ORDER BY regdate DESC

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, TO_CHAR(regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, TO_CHAR(deldate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DELDATE, reguserid, NVL(regusername2, REGUSERNAME) REGUSERNAME FROM TBL_SEALINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# ORDER BY regdate DESC
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, TO_CHAR(regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, TO_CHAR(deldate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DELDATE, reguserid, NVL(regusername2, REGUSERNAME) REGUSERNAME FROM TBL_SEALINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND deldate IS NULL ORDER BY regdate DESC

select.isEqual: SELECT sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, TO_CHAR(regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, TO_CHAR(deldate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DELDATE, reguserid, regusername, regusername2 FROM TBL_SEALDEPTINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND deptid = #v_DEPTID# ORDER BY regdate DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, TO_CHAR(regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, TO_CHAR(deldate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DELDATE, reguserid, regusername, regusername2 FROM TBL_SEALDEPTINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND deldate IS NULL AND deptid = #v_DEPTID# ORDER BY REGDATE DESC

sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.* FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT rownum as rnum, aa.* FROM (SELECT TBL_APRDOCINFO.docid, formid, orgdocid, doctype, docstate, functiontype, href, doctitle, docno, hasattachyn, hasopinionyn, TO_CHAR(startdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS STARTDATE, TO_CHAR(enddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ENDDATE, writerid, writername, NVL(writername2, WRITERNAME) AS WRITERNAME2, writerjobtitle, NVL(writerjobtitle2, WRITERJOBTITLE) AS WRITERJOBTITLE2, writerdeptid, writerdeptname, NVL(writerdeptname2,WRITERDEPTNAME) AS WRITERDEPTNAME2, ispublic, securitycode, storageperiod, keyword, formname, NVL(formname2,FORMNAME) AS FORMNAME2, itemcode, itemname, NVL(itemname2, ITEMNAME) AS ITEMNAME2, urgentapproval, tempattribute, status, specialrecordcode, publicitycode, limitrange, pagenum, cabinetid, taskcode, docnumcode, orgdocnumcode, seperateattachxml, summary, TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = GRP.DOCID RIGHT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT docid, tenant_id, companyid FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID#
TBL_APRLINEINFO.aprmembername LIKE '%' || #v_APPROVUSER# || '%'
) aaa ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.tenant_id = aaa.tenant_id AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.companyid = aaa.companyid AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.docid = aaa.docid INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.companyid AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.docid = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.docid WHERE (functiontype IS NOT NULL) AND functiontype != '010' AND (startdate IS NOT NULL) AND NVL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1
docno LIKE '%' || #v_DOCNUMBER# || '%'
doctitle LIKE '%' || #v_DOCTITLE# || '%'
WRITERNAME2
WRITERNAME
LIKE '%' || #v_DRAFTER# || '%'
WRITERDEPTNAME2
WRITERDEPTNAME
LIKE '%' || #v_DEPTNAME# || '%'
formid = #v_FORMID#
(FORMNAME LIKE '%' || #v_FORMNAME# || '%' OR FORMNAME2 LIKE '%' || #v_FORMNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\')
KEYWORD LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
docstate = #v_DOCSTATE#
TO_CHAR(startdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= #v_STARTDATE1#
TO_CHAR(startdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= #v_STARTDATE2#
TO_CHAR(enddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= #v_ENDDATE1#
TO_CHAR(enddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= #v_ENDDATE2#
ORDER BY
#v_ORDEROPTION#
#v_ORDEROPTION#, startdate DESC
startdate DESC
) aa ) WHERE rnum <= #v_PAGESIZE#) A
ORDER BY
#v_ORDEROPTION2#
#v_ORDEROPTION2#, startdate
startdate
) WHERE rownum <= #v_PAGESIZE2# ORDER BY startdate DESC
SELECT * FROM TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formcontid = #v_FORMCONTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT formcontid, TBL_FORMINFO.formid, formname, formname2, formdoctype, formdescription, formfilelocation, formconnflag, keepPeriod, passaprlineflag, TBL_AUTODOCNUM_ITEM.securityLevel, TBL_AUTODOCNUM_ITEM.isPublic, TBL_AUTODOCNUM_ITEM.itemCode, TBL_AUTODOCNUM_ITEM.itemName, TBL_AUTODOCNUM_ITEM.itemName2, TBL_AUTODOCNUM_ITEM.useFlag, TBL_AUTODOCNUM_ITEM.keepPeriodCode, aproption, SIHANGTYPE, CASE WHEN O.FORMID IS NULL THEN 'N' WHEN O.FORMID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' END AS officeFlag, formxslt, FORMDRAFTALLFLAG FROM TBL_FORMINFO JOIN TBL_AUTODOCNUM_ITEM ON TBL_FORMINFO.tenant_id = TBL_AUTODOCNUM_ITEM.tenant_id AND TBL_FORMINFO.companyid = TBL_AUTODOCNUM_ITEM.companyid AND TBL_FORMINFO.formid = TBL_AUTODOCNUM_ITEM.formid LEFT JOIN TBL_FORM_OFFICE O ON TBL_FORMINFO.tenant_id = O.tenant_id AND TBL_FORMINFO.companyid = O.companyid AND TBL_FORMINFO.formid = O.formid WHERE TBL_FORMINFO.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND TBL_FORMINFO.companyid = #companyID# AND TBL_FORMINFO.formid = #v_PFORMID#

SELECT formcontid, TBL_FORMINFO.formid, formname, formname2, formdoctype, formdescription, formfilelocation, formconnflag, FORMDRAFTALLFLAG, opengovflag, aproption , passaprlineflag, SIHANGTYPE, CASE WHEN O.FORMID IS NULL THEN 'N' WHEN O.FORMID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' END AS officeFlag, formxslt FROM TBL_FORMINFO LEFT JOIN TBL_FORM_OFFICE O ON TBL_FORMINFO.tenant_id = O.tenant_id AND TBL_FORMINFO.companyid = O.companyid AND TBL_FORMINFO.formid = O.formid WHERE TBL_FORMINFO.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND TBL_FORMINFO.companyid = #companyID# AND TBL_FORMINFO.formid = #v_PFORMID#
SELECT deptid, deptname, userid FROM TBL_FORMRECV WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formid = #v_FORMID# ORDER BY deptsn
SELECT deptid, deptname FROM TBL_FORMRECV WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formid = #v_FORMID# ORDER BY deptsn
SELECT categorycode, name, NVL(name2, NAME) NAME2, description, '1' CATEGORYTYPE, 'ROOT' FROM TBL_TASKCATEGORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND oldflag IS NULL

isEqual.isEqual: SELECT mcategorycode, name, NVL(name2, NAME) NAME2, description, '2' CATEGORYTYPE, categorycode FROM TBL_TASKMIDDLECATEGORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND categorycode = #v_PARENTID# AND mcategorycode != #v_PARENTID# AND oldflag IS NULL

SELECT mcategorycode, name, NVL(name2, NAME) NAME2, description, '2' CATEGORYTYPE, categorycode FROM TBL_TASKMIDDLECATEGORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND categorycode = #v_PARENTID# AND oldflag IS NULL

SELECT subcategorycode, name, NVL(name2, NAME) NAME2, description, '3' CATEGORYTYPE, mcategorycode FROM TBL_TASKSUBCATEGORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND mcategorycode = #v_PARENTID# AND subcategorycode != #v_PARENTID# AND oldflag IS NULL

SELECT subcategorycode, name, NVL(name2, NAME) NAME2, description, '3' CATEGORYTYPE, mcategorycode FROM TBL_TASKSUBCATEGORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND mcategorycode = #v_PARENTID# AND oldflag IS NULL

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND mainid = #v_MAINID# ORDER BY subid

SELECT DISTINCT TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.mainid, TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.mainname FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN JOIN TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB ON TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.tenant_id = TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB.tenant_id AND TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.companyid = TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB.companyid AND TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.mainid = TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB.mainid WHERE TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.companyid = #companyID# ORDER BY TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.mainid

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# ORDER BY mainid

isEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT applydate, taskcode, taskname, changefactor, beforevalue, aftervalue FROM TBL_TASKCODEHISTORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# ORDER BY sn DESC
isEqual.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT applydate, taskcode, taskname, taskname2, changefactor, beforevalue, aftervalue FROM TBL_TASKCODEHISTORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# ORDER BY sn DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= 100

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT applydate, taskcode, NVL(taskname2, TASKNAME) TASKNAME, NVL(changefactor2, CHANGEFACTOR) CHANGEFACTOR, beforevalue, aftervalue2 AFTERVALUE FROM TBL_TASKCODEHISTORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# ORDER BY sn DESC
isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT applydate, taskcode, NVL(taskname2, TASKNAME) TASKNAME, NVL(changefactor2, CHANGEFACTOR) CHANGEFACTOR, beforevalue, aftervalue2 AFTERVALUE FROM TBL_TASKCODEHISTORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# ORDER BY sn DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= 100

isEqual.isEqual: SELECT sentdeptid, sentdeptname, NVL(COUNT(sentdeptid), 0) APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docstate = '011' AND processdate >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND processdate < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# GROUP BY sentdeptid, sentdeptname ORDER BY sentdeptname

SELECT receiveddeptid , receiveddeptname , NVL(COUNT(receiveddeptid), 0) APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docstate = '011' AND processdate >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND processdate < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# GROUP BY receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname ORDER BY receiveddeptname

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT sentdeptid , sentdeptname, receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname, NVL(COUNT(sentdeptid), 0) APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docstate = '011' AND processdate >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND processdate < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# GROUP BY sentdeptid, sentdeptname, receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname ORDER BY sentdeptname, receiveddeptname

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT sentdeptid, sentdeptname2 SENTDEPTNAME, NVL(COUNT(sentdeptid), 0) APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docstate = '011' AND receivesn = '2' AND processdate >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND processdate < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# GROUP BY sentdeptid, sentdeptname2 ORDER BY sentdeptname2

SELECT receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname2 RECEIVEDDEPTNAME, COUNT(receiveddeptid) APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docstate = '011' AND processdate >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND processdate < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# GROUP BY receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname2 ORDER BY receiveddeptname2

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT sentdeptid, sentdeptname2 SENTDEPTNAME, receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname2 RECEIVEDDEPTNAME, NVL(COUNT(sentdeptid), 0) APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docstate = '011' AND processdate >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND processdate < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# GROUP BY sentdeptid, sentdeptname2, receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname2 ORDER BY sentdeptname2, receiveddeptname2

select.isEqual:
SELECT APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERID,
APRMEMBERNAME2 AS APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE,
APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE,
APRTYPE, C.NAME C.NAME2 C.NAME3 C.NAME4 AS APRTYPENAME, COUNT(APRMEMBERID) AS APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO E INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST C ON E.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND E.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID AND E.APRTYPE = C.CODE2 WHERE E.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND E.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND C.CODE1 = 'SA03'
AND processdate >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND processdate < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
GROUP BY APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERID,
APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2,
APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE,
APRTYPE, C.NAME C.NAME2 C.NAME3 C.NAME4
ORDER BY APRTYPE, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERNAME
ORDER BY APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERNAME, APRTYPE
ORDER BY APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRTYPE

SELECT APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERID,
APRMEMBERNAME2 AS APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE,
APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE,
NVL(COUNT(aprmemberid), 0) AS APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE aprtype IN
#v_APRTYPE[]#
AND processdate >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND processdate < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# GROUP BY APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERID,
APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2
APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE
ORDER BY
APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, APRMEMBERNAME2
APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERNAME

sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(COUNT(TBL_CONTAINER.containerid), 0) FROM TBL_CONTAINER JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTYPE ON TBL_CONTAINER.tenant_id = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.tenant_id AND TBL_CONTAINER.companyid = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.companyid AND TBL_CONTAINER.containertypeid = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypeid WHERE TBL_CONTAINER.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND TBL_CONTAINER.companyid = #companyID# AND TBL_CONTAINER.containertypeid = #v_CONTTYPEID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containertypeid = #v_CONTTYPEID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CONTAINERTYPE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containertypeid = #v_CONTTYPEID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT MAX(formid) FROM TBL_FORMINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formid != '9999999999'

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_AUTODOCNUM_ITEM SET ITEMNAME = #v_TASKNAME#, KEEPPERIOD = (SELECT SUBSTR(CASE WHEN #lang# is null OR #lang# = '' OR #lang# = '1' THEN NAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN NAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN NAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN NAME4 END, INSTR(CASE WHEN #lang# is null OR #lang# = '' OR #lang# = '1' THEN NAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN NAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN NAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN NAME4 END, ';', 1, 1) + 1, INSTR(CASE WHEN #lang# is null OR #lang# = '' OR #lang# = '1' THEN NAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN NAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN NAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN NAME4 END, ';', 1, 2) - INSTR(CASE WHEN #lang# is null OR #lang# = '' OR #lang# = '1' THEN NAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN NAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN NAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN NAME4 END, ';', 1, 1) - 1 ) AS NAME FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND code1 = 'SA52' AND SUBSTR(CASE WHEN #lang# is null OR #lang# = '' OR #lang# = '1' THEN NAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN NAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN NAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN NAME4 END, INSTR(NAME, ';', 1, 2) + 1) = #v_KEEPINGPERIOD#), KEEPPERIODCODE = #v_KEEPINGPERIOD#, SECURITYLEVEL = #itemSecurity#, ISPUBLIC = #isPublic# WHERE ITEMCODE = #v_TASKCODE# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_AUTODOCNUM_ITEM SET USEFLAG = 'N' WHERE ITEMCODE = #taskCode# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

insert.isNotEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_AUTODOCNUM_ITEM (formid, keepperiod, securitylevel, ispublic, itemcode, itemname, itemname2, useflag, keepperiodcode, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_PFORMID#, #keepPeriod#, #securityLevel#, #isPublic#, #tbItemCode#, #tbItemName#, #tbItemName2#, #useFlag#, #keepPeriodCode#, #companyID#, #tenantID#)

SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND subcategorycode = #v_CATECODE#
AND delflag = 0) > 0
THEN 1 ELSE (
SELECT NVL(COUNT(mcategorycode), 0) FROM TBL_TASKMIDDLECATEGORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND categorycode = #v_CATECODE# AND mcategorycode != #v_CATECODE# AND oldflag IS NULL

) END FROM DUAL

sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(COUNT(taskcode), 0) FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #v_TASKCODE#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET ON TBL_CABINETCLASS.CABINETCLASSNO = TBL_CABINET.CABINETCLASSNO AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = TBL_CABINET.COMPANYID AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = TBL_CABINET.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_CABINETCLASS.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_CABINETCLASS.TASKCODE = #v_TASKCODE# AND TBL_CABINET.DELETEDATE IS NULL AND TBL_CABINET.DELFLAG = '0'
AND TRIM(PROCESSDEPTCODE) = #v_DEPTID#
SELECT NVL(COUNT(taskcode), 0) FROM TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# AND RTRIM(processdeptcode) = #v_DEPTCODE#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(DISTINCT TBL_APRDOCINFO.docid), 0) FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_APRDOCGROUPINFO GRP ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = GRP.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = GRP.COMPANYID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = GRP.DOCID RIGHT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT docid, companyid, tenant_id FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TBL_APRLINEINFO.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.companyid = #companyID#
TBL_APRLINEINFO.aprmembername LIKE '%' || #v_APPROVUSER# || '%'
) aaa ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.tenant_id = aaa.tenant_id AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.companyid = aaa.companyid AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.docid = aaa.docid INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.companyid AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.docid = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.docid WHERE TBL_APRDOCINFO.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.companyid = #companyID# AND (functiontype IS NOT NULL) AND functiontype != '010' AND (startdate IS NOT NULL) AND NVL(GRP.TABSN, 1) = 1
docno LIKE '%' || #v_DOCNUMBER# || '%'
doctitle LIKE '%' || #v_DOCTITLE# || '%'
CASE WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# is null OR #v_LANGTYPE# = '' OR #v_LANGTYPE# = '1' THEN writername WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# = '2' THEN writername2 END LIKE '%' || #v_DRAFTER# || '%'
CASE WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# is null OR #v_LANGTYPE# = '' OR #v_LANGTYPE# = '1' THEN writerdeptname WHEN #v_LANGTYPE# = '2' THEN writerdeptname2 END LIKE '%' || #v_DEPTNAME# || '%'
formid = #v_FORMID#
(FORMNAME LIKE '%' || #v_FORMNAME# || '%' OR FORMNAME2 LIKE '%' || #v_FORMNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\')
KEYWORD LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
docstate = #v_DOCSTATE#
TO_CHAR(startdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= #v_STARTDATE1#
TO_CHAR(startdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= #v_STARTDATE2#
TO_CHAR(enddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= #v_ENDDATE1#
TO_CHAR(enddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= #v_ENDDATE2#

INSERT INTO TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO( createdate, description, processdeptname, processdeptname2, tasktransferflag, tdeptcode, processdeptcode, processdate, applydate, taskcode, delflag, deletedate, organcode, companyid, tenant_id ) SELECT creationdate, NULL, #deptName#, #deptName2#, '0', NULL, #deptCode#, #v_pNow1#, #v_pNow2#, taskcode, '0', NULL, NULL, companyid, tenant_id FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #taskCode#

INSERT INTO TBL_FORMCONTAINER (formcontid, formcontname, formcontname2, formcontowndepid, formcontparents, formcontdescription, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (#contID#, #contName#, #contName2#, #contDept#, #contParent#, #contDescript#, #companyID#, #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP (formcontid, formcontuserdepid, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (#contID#, #deptID#, #companyID#, #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_FORM_AUTORULE (formid, autorulesn, autoruleguid, checkfieldtype, checkfield, operatortype, operator, condtype, condvalue, condvaluedeptid, doctype, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (#formID#, #autoRuleSN#, #autoRuleGUID#, #checkFieldType#, #checkField#, #operatorType#, #operator#, #condType#, #condValue#, #condValueDeptID#, #docType#, #companyID#, #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_FORM_AUTORULELINE (formid, autoruleguid, aprmembersn, aprtype, aprstate, aprmemberid, aprmemberisdeptyn, aprmembername, aprmembername2, aprmemberjobtitle, aprmemberjobtitle2, aprmemberdeptid, aprmemberdeptname, aprmemberdeptname2, aprmemberldappath, receiveddate, processdate, reasondonotapprov, isproposeryn, isbriefuseryn, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (#formID#, #autoRuleGUID#, #aprMemberSN#, #aprType#, #aprState#, #aprMemberID#, #aprMemberIsDeptYN#, #aprMemberName#, #aprMemberName2#, #aprMemberJobTitle#, #aprMemberJobTitle2#, #aprMemberDeptID#, #aprMemberDeptName#, #aprMemberDeptName2#, #aprMemberLdapPath#, #receiveDate#, #processDate#, #reasonDoNotApprov#, #isProposerYN#, #isBriefUserYN#, #companyID#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CONTAINER SET containertypeid = #contType#, containerowndepid = #deptID# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containerid = #contID#

UPDATE TBL_TASKCODE SET taskname = #v_TASKNAME#, taskname2 = #v_TASKNAME2#, keepingperiod = #v_KEEPINGPERIOD#, kpreason = #v_KPREASON#, keepingmethod = #v_KEEPINGMETHOD#, keepingplace = #v_KEEPINGPLACE#, displayrecflag = #v_DISPLAYRECFLAG#, displayrectrastime = #v_DISPLAYRECTRASTIME#, exdisplayfrequency = #v_EXDISPLAYFREQUENCY#, specialcatalogflag = #v_SPECIALCATALOGFLAG#, sc1 = #v_SC1#, sc2 = #v_SC2#, sc3 = #v_SC3#, displayusage = #v_DISPLAYUSAGE#, description = #v_DESCRIPTION#, subcategorycode = #v_SUBCATEGORYCODE#, itemsecurity = #itemSecurity#, ispublic = #isPublic# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #v_TASKCODE#
UPDATE TBL_TASKCODE SET delflag = '1' WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #taskCode#
UPDATE TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO SET delflag = '1', deletedate = TO_DATE(#now#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #taskCode#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_MYTASKCODE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #taskCode#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO SET processDate = #v_pNow1#, processDeptName = #deptName#, processDeptName2 = #deptName2#, delFlag = '0', deletedate = NULL WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #taskCode# AND TRIM(processdeptcode) = #deptCode#

UPDATE TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO SET processdate = #v_pNow1#, delflag = '1', deletedate = TO_DATE(#v_pNow2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid= #companyID# AND taskcode = #taskCode# AND TRIM(processdeptcode) = #deptCode#

UPDATE TBL_FORMCONTAINER SET formcontname = #contName#, formcontname2 = #contName2#, formcontowndepid = #contDept#, formcontparents = #contParent#, formcontdescription = #contDescript# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formcontid = #contID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_CONTAINERUSEDEP WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containerID = #contID#
DELETE FROM TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formcontid = #contID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID#
DELETE FROM TBL_FORM_AUTORULE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formid = #formID#
DELETE FROM TBL_FORM_AUTORULELINE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formid = #formID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT sn, code, id, name FROM TBL_FORMPROPERTY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND uppercode = #upperCode#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_FORMINFO SET formcontid = #selContID#, formorder = (SELECT NVL(MAX(formorder), 0) + 1 FROM TBL_FORMINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formcontid = #selContID#) WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formcontid = #contID# AND formid = #formID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT name, name2, name3, name4, tablename FROM TBL_LISTOPTION WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND listtype = #v_LISTTYPE# AND dtype IS NULL ORDER BY sn
sqlMap.update: update tbl_expendaprdocinfo set orgcontid = #sourceContID# where tenant_id = #tenantID# and companyid = #companyID# and docid in ( select a.docid from tbl_endaprdocinfo a where a.tenant_id = #tenantID# and a.companyid = #companyID# and a.containerid = #sourceContID# )
update tbl_endaprdocinfo set containerid = #targetContID# where tenant_id = #tenantID# and companyid = #companyID# and containerid = #sourceContID#

update tbl_endaprdocinfo set containerid = #targetContID# where tenant_id = #tenantID# and companyid = #companyID# and containerid = #sourceContID# and docid in
#docIDList[]#

update tbl_expendaprdocinfo set orgcontid = #sourceContID# where tenant_id = #tenantID# and companyid = #companyID# and docid in
#docIDList[]#

update tbl_expendaprdocinfo set delflag = 'Y' where tenant_id = #tenantID# and companyid = #companyID# and docid in ( select docid from tbl_endaprdocinfo where tenant_id = #tenantID# and companyid = #companyID# and containerid = #contID#
and enddate >= #startDate# and enddate <= #endDate#
) and delflag is null
storageperiod = #storagePeriod#
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(*) FROM TBL_CONTAINER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containertypeid = #contType# AND containerowndepid = #deptID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_FORMCONNINFO

SELECT CASE #v_LANG# WHEN '1' THEN FORMCONTNAME WHEN '2' THEN FORMCONTNAME2 END AS FORMCONTNAME FROM TBL_FORMCONTAINER WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND FORMCONTID = #v_PARENTID#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_expendaprdocinfo set delflag = 'Y' where tenant_id = #tenantID# and companyid = #companyID# and docid = #docid# and delflag is null
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, B.DOCID, B.DOCTYPE, B.DOCSTATE, B.FUNCTIONTYPE, B.HREF, B.DOCTITLE, B.DOCNO, B.HASATTACHYN, B.HASOPINIONYN, B.STARTDATE, ENDDATE, B.WRITERID, B.WRITERNAME, B.WRITERNAME2, B.WRITERJOBTITLE, B.WRITERJOBTITLE2, B.WRITERDEPTID, B.WRITERDEPTNAME2, B.WRITERDEPTNAME, B.FORMID, B.CONTAINERID, B.FORMNAME, B.FORMNAME2, B.STATUS, B.ORGDOCID, B.ISPUBLIC, B.EDMSYN, B.SECURITYAPPROVAL, B.DOCSTATENAME FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TO_CHAR(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE+#v_OFFSET#/(24*60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ENDDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.CONTAINERID, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.STATUS, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.EDMSYN, (CASE WHEN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYAPPROVAL IS NULL THEN '' ELSE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYAPPROVAL END) AS SECURITYAPPROVAL, CASE WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '1' THEN C.name WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '2' THEN C.name2 WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '3' THEN C.name3 WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '4' THEN C.name4 end AS DOCSTATENAME FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST C ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE = C.CODE2 AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST D ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE = D.CODE2 AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = D.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO E ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = E.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID WHERE
CONTAINERID IS NOT NULL
CONTAINERID IN (#v_CONTID#)
AND
C.CODE1 = 'SA02' AND D.CODE1 = 'A04' AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL
#v_USERSECCODE# <= TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docNO LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionDocNo#), '%')
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docTitle LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionDocTitle#), '%')
(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writerName LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterName#), '%') OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writerName2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterName#), '%'))
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.EndDate >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionEndDate1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.EndDate <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionEndDate2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.deletetime >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionDeleteTime1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.deletetime <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionDeleteTime2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID = #q_Map.qOptionWriterDeptId#
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.formId = #q_Map.qOptionFormId#
AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
ORDER BY ENDDATE DESC
) B WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE3# + #v_PAGESIZE2# ) A WHERE A.RNUM > #v_PAGESIZE3#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, A.DOCID, A.DOCNO, A.DOCTITLE, WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERNAME, A.DELETEUSERID, ENDDATE, RECEIPTPOINTNAME, A.HASATTACHYN, A.ISPUBLIC, A.FORMNAME, A.DOCSTATENAME FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.DOCID, TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.DOCNO, TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.DOCTITLE, TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.DEPTNAME AS WRITERDEPTNAME, TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.WRITERNAME, TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.DELETEUSERID, TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.DELETETIME AS ENDDATE, TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.DELETEUSERID AS RECEIPTPOINTNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, CASE WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '1' THEN C.name WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '2' THEN C.name2 WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '3' THEN C.name3 WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '4' THEN C.name4 END AS DOCSTATENAME FROM TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY INNER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST C ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE = C.CODE2 AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST D ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE = D.CODE2 AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = D.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO E ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = E.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID WHERE C.CODE1 = 'SA02' AND D.CODE1 = 'A04'
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docNO LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionDocNo#), '%')
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docTitle LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionDocTitle#), '%')
(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writerName LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterName#), '%') OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writerName2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterName#), '%'))
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.EndDate >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionEndDate1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.EndDate <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionEndDate2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.deletetime >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionDeleteTime1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.deletetime <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionDeleteTime2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID = #q_Map.qOptionWriterDeptId#
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.formId = #q_Map.qOptionFormId#
AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY ENDDATE DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE3# + #v_PAGESIZE2# ) B WHERE B.RNUM > #v_PAGESIZE3#

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID
WHERE CONTAINERID IS NOT NULL
WHERE CONTAINERID IN (#v_CONTID#)
AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL
#v_USERSECCODE# <= TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docNO LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionDocNo#), '%')
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docTitle LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionDocTitle#), '%')
(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writerName LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterName#), '%') OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writerName2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterName#), '%'))
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.EndDate >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionEndDate1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.EndDate <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionEndDate2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.deletetime >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionDeleteTime1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.deletetime <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionDeleteTime2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID = #q_Map.qOptionWriterDeptId#
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.formId = #q_Map.qOptionFormId#
AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY INNER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docNO LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionDocNo#), '%')
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docTitle LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionDocTitle#), '%')
(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writerName LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterName#), '%') OR TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.writerName2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterName#), '%'))
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.EndDate >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionEndDate1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.EndDate <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionEndDate2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.deletetime >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionDeleteTime1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY.deletetime <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionDeleteTime2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID = #q_Map.qOptionWriterDeptId#
TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.formId = #q_Map.qOptionFormId#
AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_SHARE_DOC_DIR(OWNER_ID, SHARE_ID, SHARE_TYPE, TENANT_ID, OWNER_TYPE)
SELECT #ownerId#, #shareList[].shareId#, #shareList[].shareType#, #tenantId#, #ownerType# FROM DUAL
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SHARE_DOC_DIR WHERE OWNER_ID = #ownerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT A.OWNER_ID as ownerId, CASE WHEN A.OWNER_TYPE = 'U' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME WHEN A.OWNER_TYPE = 'D' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME END AS ownerName, A.OWNER_TYPE as ownerType FROM TBL_SHARE_DOC_DIR A LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON (A.OWNER_ID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON (A.OWNER_ID = C.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID) WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT A.SHARE_ID as shareId, CASE WHEN A.SHARE_TYPE = 'U' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME WHEN A.SHARE_TYPE = 'D' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME END AS shareName, A.SHARE_TYPE as shareType FROM TBL_SHARE_DOC_DIR A LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON (A.SHARE_ID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON (A.SHARE_ID = C.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID) WHERE A.OWNER_ID = #ownerId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_DOCDELETEHISTORY ( DOCID, DOCNO, DOCTITLE, DEPTNAME, WRITERNAME, DELETEUSERID, DELETETIME, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) VALUES ( #docid#, #docno#, #doctitle#, #deptname#, #writername#, #deluserid#, TO_DATE(#deleteday#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #tenantID#, #companyID# )
INSERT INTO TBL_FORM_OFFICE VALUES(#v_PFORMID#, #tenantID#, #companyID#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_FORM_OFFICE WHERE FORMID = #v_PFORMID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_GOVSENDDOCHISTORY SET SENDFLAG = 'N' WHERE
SENDDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(#startTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#endTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
sqlMap.select: SELECT DOCID, MODIFIERNAME, MODIFIERDEPTNAME, MODIFYDATE, SN FROM TBL_OPENGOVMODIFYHISTORY WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY SN DESC
SELECT MODIFYREASON FROM TBL_OPENGOVMODIFYHISTORY WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND SN = #sn# AND TENANTID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT COUNT(ATTACHLIMITCNT) FROM TBL_APRATTACHLIMIT WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
SELECT NVL(ATTACHLIMITCNT, -1) FROM TBL_APRATTACHLIMIT WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_APRATTACHLIMIT (ATTACHLIMITCNT, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID) VALUES (#v_ATTACHLIMIT#, #v_COMPANYID#, #v_TENANTID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRATTACHLIMIT SET ATTACHLIMITCNT = #v_ATTACHLIMIT# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_APRATTACHLIMIT WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#

SELECT COUNT(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL

TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN IN ('A','E','H','I','R','S','T','V','Y')
DOCNO LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionDocNo#), '%')
DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionDocTitle#), '%')
WRITERNAME2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterName#), '%')
WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterName#), '%')
WRITERDEPTNAME2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterDeptName#), '%')
WRITERDEPTNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterDeptName#), '%')
RECEIVEDDATE >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionReceivedDate1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionStartDate1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
RECEIVEDDATE <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionReceivedDate2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#q_Map.qOptionStartDate2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO.PROCESSYN = #q_Map.qOptionSearchStatus#

, ENDDATE DESC

) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE# ) B

, ENDDATE

SELECT DOCID, FILENAME, FOLDERNAME, FILESTATE, SENDSTATE, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTID, WRITERDEPTNAME, CREATEDATE, UPDATEDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_SENDOUTINFO LIMIT 1
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SENDOUTINFO ( IDEX, DOCID, FILENAME, FOLDERNAME, FILESTATE, SENDSTATE, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTID, WRITERDEPTNAME, CREATEDATE, UPDATEDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) VALUES ( SENDOUTINFO_SEQ.NEXTVAL #V_DOCID#, #V_FILENAME#, #V_FOLDERNAME#, #V_FILESTATE#, #V_SENDSTATE#, #V_WRITERID#, #V_WRITERNAME#, #V_WRITERDEPTID#, #V_WRITERDEPTNAME#, NOW(), NOW(), #V_TENANT_ID#, #V_COMPANYID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SENDOUTINFO SET FOLDERNAME = #V_FOLDERNAME#, FILESTATE = #V_FILESTATE#, SENDSTATE = #V_SENDSTATE#, UPDATEDATE = NOW() WHERE IDEX = (SELECT max(IDEX) from TBL_SENDOUTINFO where FILENAME = #V_FILENAME# AND FILESTATE = 'success') AND DOCID = #V_DOCID#

TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #q_Map.qOptionWriterName#), '%')

SELECT DOCID, FILENAME, FOLDERNAME, FILESTATE, SENDSTATE, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTID, WRITERDEPTNAME, CREATEDATE, UPDATEDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_SENDOUTINFO WHERE FILESTATE = #V_FILESTATE#

SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID,TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ENDDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
DOCNO LIKE '%' || #v_DOCNUMBER# || '%'
DOCTITLE LIKE '%' || #v_DOCTITLE# || '%'
WRITERNAME LIKE '%' || #v_DRAFTER# || '%'
WRITERNAME2 LIKE '%' || #v_DRAFTER2# || '%'
WRITERDEPTNAME LIKE '%' || #v_DEPTNAME# || '%'
WRITERDEPTNAME2 LIKE '%' || #v_DEPTNAME2# || '%'
FORMID = #v_FORMID#
(FORMNAME LIKE '%' || #v_FORMNAME# || '%' OR FORMNAME2 LIKE '%' || #v_FORMNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\')
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME LIKE '%' || #v_APPROVUSER# || '%'
KEYWORD LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
ITEMCODE = #v_ITEMCODE#
)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT row_number() over(ORDER BY NULL) as rnum, A.* FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, NVL(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME) AS WRITERNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, NVL(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE) AS WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, NVL(TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME) AS WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.CONTAINERID, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, NVL(TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME) AS FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.STATUS, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.EDMSYN, NVL(TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYAPPROVAL,'') AS SECURITYAPPROVAL, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID, TBL_DEPTMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 companyName, TBL_DEPTMASTER.COMPNM2 companyName2, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID#
STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE1#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ENDDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
DOCNO LIKE '%' || #v_DOCNUMBER# || '%'
DOCTITLE LIKE '%' || #v_DOCTITLE# || '%'
WRITERNAME LIKE '%' || #v_DRAFTER# || '%'
WRITERNAME2 LIKE '%' || #v_DRAFTER2# || '%'
WRITERDEPTNAME LIKE '%' || #v_DEPTNAME# || '%'
WRITERDEPTNAME2 LIKE '%' || #v_DEPTNAME2# || '%'
FORMID = #v_FORMID#
(FORMNAME LIKE '%' || #v_FORMNAME# || '%' OR FORMNAME2 LIKE '%' || #v_FORMNAME# || '%' ESCAPE '\')
KEYWORD LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
ITEMCODE = #v_ITEMCODE#
TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME LIKE '%' || #v_APPROVUSER# || '%' GROUP BY TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCNO, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.STARTDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ENDDATE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME2, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.CONTAINERID, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.FORMNAME2, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.STATUS, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.ISPUBLIC, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.EDMSYN, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYAPPROVAL, TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID, TBL_DEPTMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, TBL_DEPTMASTER.COMPNM2, TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG
ORDER BY ENDDATE DESC, DOCNO DESC
) A
WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PAGESIZE#
) X WHERE X.rnum >= #v_PAGESIZE3# + 1
ORDER BY ENDDATE, DOCNO

SELECT ROWNUM, TB.* FROM ( SELECT A.AUDITAPPRLINEID, A.USERID,
A.USERID AS VALUE,
B.DISPLAYNAME AS VALUE,
A.ORDERBY, A.INSERTDATE, A.TENANT_ID, A.COMPANYID, B.DISPLAYNAME AS USERNM, B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 AS POSITION, B.MAIL, B.TELEPHONENUMBER, B.COMPANY, C.CN AS DEPTID, C.DISPLAYNAME AS DEPTNM,
B.DISPLAYNAME2 AS USERNM2, C.DISPLAYNAME2 AS DEPTNM2, '' AS TITLE FROM TBL_AUDITAPPRLINE A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.USERID = B.CN INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A.DEPTID = C.CN LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE D ON B.CN = D.CN WHERE 1=1 AND A.AUDITAPPRLINEID = #auditApprLineId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyId# AND D.CN IS NULL ORDER BY ORDERBY ASC ) TB WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN #startRow# AND #endRow#

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TBL_AUDITAPPRLINE A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.USERID = B.CN INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A.DEPTID = C.CN LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE D ON B.CN = D.CN WHERE 1=1 AND A.AUDITAPPRLINEID = #auditApprLineId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyId# AND D.CN IS NULL
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_AUDITAPPRLINE WHERE AUDITAPPRLINEID = #auditApprLineId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_AUDITAPPRLINE ( AUDITAPPRLINEID, USERID, DEPTID, ORDERBY, INSERTDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) VALUES ( #auditApprLineId#, #userId#, #deptId#, #orderBy#, SYSDATE, #tenantId#, #companyId# )
sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.DOCID ,A.WRITERDEPTNAME ,A.DOCNO ,A.DOCTITLE ,TO_CHAR(TB.PROCESSDATE + #offsetMin#/(24*60), 'YYYY-MM-DD AM HH:MI:SS') AS PROCESSDATE ,TO_CHAR(A.STARTDATE + #offsetMin#/(24*60), 'YYYY-MM-DD AM HH:MI:SS') AS STARTDATE ,TO_CHAR(A.ENDDATE + #offsetMin#/(24*60), 'YYYY-MM-DD AM HH:MI:SS') AS ENDDATE ,TB.APRMEMBERNAME ,D.CONTENT FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO A INNER JOIN (SELECT B.DOCID ,B.APRMEMBERSN ,C.APRMEMBERNAME ,C.PROCESSDATE FROM (SELECT DOCID ,MAX(APRMEMBERSN) AS APRMEMBERSN FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE APRTYPE = '005'
AND APRMEMBERID IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 LIKE '%s=1%')
AND APRMEMBERID IN (SELECT USERID FROM TBL_AUDITAPPRLINE WHERE ORDERBY = TO_NUMBER(#idx#))
GROUP BY DOCID) B INNER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO C ON B.DOCID = C.DOCID AND B.APRMEMBERSN = C.APRMEMBERSN ) TB ON A.DOCID = TB.DOCID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPROPINIONINFO D ON A.DOCID = D.DOCID WHERE 1=1
AND A.STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offsetMin#/(24*60) AND A.ENDDATE <= TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offsetMin#/(24*60)
AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyId# ORDER BY A.DOCID ASC
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB (mainid, subid, deptid, deptname, deptname2, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (SEQ_TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.CURRVAL, (SELECT NVL(MAX(subid), 0) + 1 FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB), #deptId#, (SELECT DISPLAYNAME FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE cn = #deptId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#), (SELECT DISPLAYNAME2 FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE cn = #deptId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#), #companyId#, #tenantId#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(cn) FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE cn = #deptId#
SELECT DEPTID, DEPTNAME FROM TBL_SERIALNUMGEN_GRANT WHERE GRANTDEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SERIALNUMGEN_GRANT (IDX, DEPTID, DEPTNAME, GRANTDEPTID, GRANTDEPTNAME, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES (SEQ_SERIALNUMGEN_GRANT_IDX.NEXTVAL, #v_DEPTID#, #v_DEPTNAME#, #v_GRANTDEPTID#, #v_GRANTDEPTNAME#, #v_TENANTID#, #v_COMPANYID#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SERIALNUMGEN_GRANT WHERE GRANTDEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT DEPTNAME FROM TBL_SERIALNUMGEN_GRANT WHERE DEPTID IN
#v_DEPTIDS[]#
AND GRANTDEPTID <> #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#

SELECT A.CABINETCLASSNO as "v_OrgCabinetClassNo", '' AS "v_CabinetClassNo", '' AS "v_ProductionYear", '' AS "v_RegSerialNo", '0' AS "v_TerminateFlag", A.title AS "v_Title", A.title2 AS "v_Title2", A.rectypecode AS "v_RecTypeCode", '' AS "v_ExpirationYear", A.keepingmethod AS "v_KeepingMethod", A.keepingplace AS "v_KeepingPlace", '' AS "v_DisplayEndDate", '' AS "v_DisplayReason", A.ownername AS "v_OwnerName", A.ownername2 AS "v_OwnerName2", A.ownerid AS "v_OwnerID", '1' AS "v_OldCabinetFlag", '0' AS "v_SpecialCatalogFlag", '0' AS "v_ConfirmFlag", '' AS "v_SYSDATE", A.keepingperiod AS "v_KeepingPeriod", A.displayrecflag AS "v_DisplayRecFlag", A.processdeptcode AS "v_ProcessDeptCode", A.processdeptname AS "v_ProcessDeptName", A.processdeptname2 AS "v_ProcessDeptName2", A.taskcode AS "v_TaskCode", A.taskname AS "v_TaskName", A.taskname2 AS "v_TaskName2", '0' AS "v_TransDelayFlag", TRIM(A.processdeptcode) AS "v_OwnerDeptID", A.taskcode AS "v_OwnerTask", 'N' AS "v_DelayEndYFlag", '0' AS "v_DelFlag", B.companyid AS "companyID", '' AS "v_TENANTID" FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS A INNER JOIN TBL_CABINET B ON A.CabinetClassNo = B.CabinetClassNo AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_TASKCODE C ON A.TASKCODE = C.TASKCODE AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID WHERE A.EXPIRATIONYEAR = #v_YEAR# AND A.DELAYENDYFLAG = 'N' AND A.DELFLAG = '0' AND B.DELFLAG = '0' AND B.CABINETTRANSFERFLAG != '2' AND B.VOLUMENO = '001' AND C.DELFLAG = '0' AND A.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT DISTINCT(PRODUCTIONYEAR) FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS WHERE COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND
PRODUCTIONYEAR <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')
ORDER BY PRODUCTIONYEAR DESC
SELECT FORMCONTID FROM TBL_FORMCONTAINER WHERE FORMCONTPARENTS IN ( #checkList[]# ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_FORMCONTAINER SET FORMCONTPARENTS = #selContID#, SN = NULL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMCONTID = #contID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_FORMCONTAINER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMCONTPARENTS = #contID# ORDER BY CASE WHEN SN IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, SN, FORMCONTID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_FORMCONTAINER SET SN = #order# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMCONTPARENTS = #contID# AND FORMCONTID = #targetContID#
